The '''Manda-Roon Merchant Route''' was a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] that ran from the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Manda/Legends|Manda]] to the the planet of [[Roon/Legends|Roon]], which was located within the region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] known as [[Cloak of the Sith/Legends|The Cloak of the Sith]].

==History==
The route was blazed by [[Mungo Baobab]], and was one of only two routes that ran through that treacherous area of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], the other being the less known [[Death Wind Corridor/Legends|Death Wind Corridor]]. Although heavily traveled, the route was a challenge even for the most seasoned astronavigators and was marked by a series of [[Navigational beacon/Legends|nav-beacons]] attached to "[[lightstation]]" [[Space station/Legends|space stations]] to assist in navigating the route successfully. Prior to the lightstations, travelers had to follow the annual path of the [[rainbow comet]], just as Baobab had when first pioneering the route.

==Appearances==
*{{DroidsCite|Tail of the Roon Comets}} {{1st}}
